title: Bulk edit ergonomics: mark everything high priority
description: Probes whether the agent discovers vikunja_task_bulk / bulk-update rather than updating each task one at a time (docs/API_NOTES.md's 'Bulk Operations' section).
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Backlog Cleanup" with 8 tasks named "{{prefix}}item-1" through "{{prefix}}item-8". Then, in one bulk update, mark all 8 of them as high priority (priority 5).
